nasb.text: I will make the lame a remnant And the outcasts a strong nation, And the Lord will reign over them in Mount Zion From now on and forever.

esv.text: and the lame I will make the remnant, and those who were cast off, a strong nation; and the Lord will reign over them in Mount Zion from this time forth and forevermore.

cnv.text: 我必使瘸腿的作餘民； 使被放逐的成為強國； 耶和華必在錫安山作王統治他們， 從現在直到永遠。

ccb.text: 我要使瘸腿的成为余民， 让被掳的成为强国。 耶和华要在锡安山做王治理他们， 从那时直到永远。
